Headline: #126 Jackson Temporary Reroute near Jackson/Canal
ShortDescription: 126 Jackson buses temp. rerouted : due to, street blockage near Jackson/Canal.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#126 Jackson buses temp. rerouted : due to, street blockage near Jackson/Canal.

Eastbound buses will operate via Jackson, Canal, Monroe, LaSalle and Jackson including the normal route streets.

Westbound buses will operate via Adams, LaSalle, Madson and Clinton.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #151 Sheridan Temporary Reroute near Jackson/Canal
ShortDescription: 151 Sheridan buses temp. rerouted : due to, street blockage near Jackson/Canal.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#151 Sheridan buses temp. rerouted : due to, street blockage near Jackson/Canal.

Eastbound buses will operate via Jackson, Canal, Monroe and Dearborn including the normal route streets.

Westbound buses will operate via Adams, LaSalle, Madison and Clinton.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #22 Clark and #152 Addison Temporary Reroute near Clark/Addison
ShortDescription: #22 Clark and #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to a Cubs game near Clark/Addison.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#22 Clark and #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to a Cubs game near Clark/Addison.

#22 Clark buses will operate via Clark, Racine, Belmont, then resume their normal route on Clark.

#152 Addison buses will operate via Addison, Racine, Belmont, Halsted, then resume their normal route on Addison.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Purple Line Service Delayed near Main
ShortDescription: Purple Line trains are standing near Main due to an unauthorized person on the tracks. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Purple Line trains are standing near Main due to an unauthorized person on the tracks.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Shuttle buses are available to provide connecting service through the affected area between Howard to Linden.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
